executive_summary: 3 issues found. 2 require your decision before GSTR-1 can be filed. Estimated net tax payable: ₹31,440. GSTR-1 and GSTR-3B drafts are ready pending your review.

decisions_required_from_ca.decision: Verma Traders (MTT/OCT/004) — Confirm reclassification from B2B to B2CS
decisions_required_from_ca.context: GSTIN cancelled Sep 15, 2024. Invoice dated Oct 15, 2024. Agent has moved to B2CS in draft.

decisions_required_from_ca.decision: Dye Masters ITC (DM/2024/387) — Claim ₹5,040 or defer?
decisions_required_from_ca.context: Supplier hasn't filed GSTR-1. Not in GSTR-2B. Agent excluded from draft (conservative).
options: DEFER — do not claim. Safer. Claim next month if supplier files.
CLAIM provisionally — saves ₹5,040 now but risk reversal with 24% interest if supplier never files.
decisions_required_from_ca.recommendation: Defer. Call Dye Masters and ask them to file before Nov 13.
decisions_required_from_ca.tax_impact: ₹5,040 difference in tax payable this month

decisions_required_from_ca.decision: HSN code on MTT/OCT/003 (Gupta Exports) — 5407 or 5208?
decisions_required_from_ca.context: Item is 'Cotton Plain Weave Fabric'. HSN 5407 = synthetic. HSN 5208 = cotton. Both are 12%.
options: CONFIRM 5407 if fabric is synthetic blend
CHANGE to 5208 if fabric is pure cotton
decisions_required_from_ca.tax_impact: None — same GST rate. Matters for annual HSN accuracy.

tax_payable_summary.note: Instruct Mehta to deposit ₹31,440 via GST portal by Nov 18

filing_checklist.task: Decide on Dye Masters ITC strategy
